name: Ethan Smith
title: CEO @ Graphite.io | Reforge | IE Business School
summary: Growth expert, founder, and pioneer in AEO (Answer Engine Optimization) and SEO frameworks. Known for the '5% Rule' in growth marketing.

frameworks.name: The 5% Rule
frameworks.description: 95% of SEO/Growth work results in low impact; the remaining 5% drives 95% of the results. Identify and scale the 5%.

frameworks.name: Topical Authority
frameworks.description: Building topical context rather than individual keywords to dominate search engine and AI recommendations.

frameworks.name: AEO (Answer Engine Optimization)
frameworks.description: Optimizing content to be the primary citation for LLMs like ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Claude.

experience.impact: Helping Notion, MasterClass, and Webflow scale through SEO and AEO strategy.

experience.description: Teaching SEO and Growth Marketing since 2011.

education.degree: BS in CS & BA in Psychology
